text:
Nagmum In Chapter 372 (page 6, panel 7; pg. 7, pn. 3), Viz transliterated the character's name as "Nagomam". (ナゴマム, Nagomamu) was a Royal Bodyguard for Prince Momoze Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 366 until her death, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 368 and also operated as a spy for Queen Seiko. 

Appearance

Nagmum has a plump, round face, small, round eyes, a small bulbous nose, and dark, triangular eyebrows. His hair is fair and spiky. He wears a black suit and a tie as a bodyguard.

Plot

Succession Contest arc

As Prince Momoze rests in her bedroom, Nagmum and Tuffdy lay in their beds, Tuffdy plots to assassinate the Prince. After Prince Momoze's murder, Nagmum, along with the other bodyguards, are taken into custody by the Kakin Army to be interrogated about the murder. Hanzo suspects him or Tuffdy as the one who killed the prince with a double. 

During Hanzo's visit to Tuffdy's prison cell, Hanzo informs Tuffdy that he's an envoy of the first prince who wants to see him. Claiming a deal was struck with the Kakin Royal Army, Hanzo claimed that Nagmum was going to confess to Prince Momoze's murder in his suicide note. In exchange for this deal, Tuffdy had to explain how he committed the crime. Tuffdy gives a full explanation of how he committed the murder. With Tuffdy's back turned, Hanzo informs him that Magnum was currently drugged unconscious and asks that he assist him with staging the suicide. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 372 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

His name appears to be an anagram of the word "magnum" (マグナム, magunamu).
In the Viz translation of Chapter 372, Nagmum's name is alternatively transliterated as "Nagomam".
